name: construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual reconciliation of subcontractor invoices and time sheets is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual reconciliation of subcontractor invoices and time sheets is time-consuming and error-prone.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
